description_long: This nightstand is a compact, rectangular piece of furniture crafted from medium-toned wood, featuring a simple and functional design. The front side displays two open shelves, providing accessible storage space for small items, books, or electronics. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for supporting lamps, clocks, or decorative objects. The sides and back are solid panels, with the wood grain visible throughout, giving it a warm and natural appearance. The legs are short and straight, integrated into the side panels for stability. There are no visible handles, drawers, or decorative elements, emphasizing a minimalist and utilitarian style.
description: A small, wooden nightstand with two open shelves and a flat top, featuring a minimalist, functional design with visible wood grain.
description_view_0: Front view showing two open shelves and the flat top surface.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood panel and the short, straight legs.
description_view_2: Rear view with a solid wood back panel and no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the other side with a solid panel and short legs.
attribute_leg_design: short straight wooden legs integrated into side panels
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
